flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at American National University fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (868 → 630).

flags.summary: First-year retention at American National University rose 150% between 2021 and 2024 (33.3% → 83.3%).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at American National University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.3% → 0.0%).
